items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt:
Scratch all of that — and now the Knicks move De Larrea and then Peat to pick up five second-rounders and select no player in first round, multiple sources confirm.

Still have the No. 31 pick tomorrow, which I wouldn’t be surprised if they move

items.title: Sources: New York traded No. 25 pick Sergio De Larrea to the Dallas Mavericks for No. 30 Koa Peat and two second-round picks. And then the Knicks traded Peat to the Phoenix Suns for three-rounders and cash. So Knicks move out of the first round -- pick up 5 seconds and cash.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
